_meta.name: Morby Prescreen Question Sets
_meta.source: List pertanyaan prescreen interview awal (the Bank KPR)
_meta.usage: After intent is READY_TO_APPLY, pick the set by product (decision_routing), run questions one at a time, store answers in memory, then produce file a (.txt). Honour 'conditional': skip a question if its dependency is not met. 'flag_hint' lets the assistant raise an early signal (e.g. risk) for the sales side; it is NOT a credit decision.
_meta.disclaimer: Interview awal ini hanya untuk triase awal, bukan keputusan kredit. Keputusan akhir mengikuti analisa kredit dan Perjanjian Kredit.

primary.label: Pengajuan KPR PRI
primary.intro: Baik pak/bu, terima kasih konfirmasinya. Sebelum kami teruskan ke tim marketing, apakah boleh dibantu interview awal?

questions.text_en: Full name as on your ID card (KTP)?
Active mobile number (WhatsApp)?
Active email address?

questions.text: Pembelian dari developer atau properti second? Apakah sudah booking fee atau UTJ?
questions.text_en: Buying from a developer or a secondary property? Have you paid a booking fee / deposit (UTJ)?

questions.text: Kerja atau usaha di bidang apa? Sudah berapa lama?
questions.text_en: What is your job or business field, and for how long?

questions.text: Penghasilan bersih per bulan berapa? (minimal Rp10 juta)
questions.text_en: What is your net monthly income? (minimum IDR 10 million)
What is your current occupation?

questions.text: Apakah pernah ada history telat atau ikut restrukturisasi dalam 12 bulan terakhir?
questions.text_en: Any history of late payments or restructuring in the last 12 months?
Will it be owner-occupied or rented out?

questions.text: Jumlah plafon kredit yang diajukan berapa? (dalam Rupiah)
questions.text_en: What loan amount (plafond) are you applying for? (in IDR)

questions.text: Tenor kredit yang diajukan berapa tahun?
questions.text_en: What loan tenor (in years) are you applying for?

questions.text: Apabila beli rumah second, apakah jaminan sudah sertifikat atau masih PPJB?
questions.text_en: If buying a secondary house, is the collateral already certified or still under PPJB?
Full address of the property / collateral?
In which city is the collateral located?
Postal code of the property / collateral?

primary.intro_en: Thank you for confirming. Before we forward this to the marketing team, may we run a short initial interview?

take_over.label: Pengajuan KPR TO
take_over.intro: Baik pak/bu, untuk interview awal sebelum kami teruskan ke marketing, apakah boleh dibantu?

questions.text_en: Full name as on your ID card (KTP)?
Active mobile number (WhatsApp)?
Active email address?

questions.text: Apakah sudah sertifikat atau masih PPJB?
questions.text_en: Is it already certified or still under PPJB?

questions.text: Kerja atau usaha di bidang apa? Sudah berapa lama?
questions.text_en: What is your job or business field, and for how long?

questions.text: Penghasilan bersih per bulan berapa? (minimal Rp10 juta)
questions.text_en: What is your net monthly income? (minimum IDR 10 million)
What is your current occupation?

questions.text: Apakah pernah ikut restrukturisasi atau ada history keterlambatan dalam 12 bulan terakhir?
questions.text_en: Any restructuring or history of late payments in the last 12 months?

questions.text: Kondisi jaminan kosong, dihuni, atau disewakan?
questions.text_en: Is the collateral vacant, occupied, or rented out?

questions.text: Fasilitas di bank asal berupa KPR atau multiguna?
questions.text_en: Is the facility at the current bank a mortgage (KPR) or a multipurpose loan?
Which bank are you taking over from?
Do you plan to top up?

questions.text: Jumlah plafon kredit yang diajukan berapa? (take over + top up bila ada, dalam Rupiah)
questions.text_en: What loan amount (plafond) are you applying for? (take over + top up if any, in IDR)

questions.text: Tenor kredit yang diajukan berapa tahun?
questions.text_en: What loan tenor (in years) are you applying for?
Full address of the property / collateral?
In which city is the collateral located?
Postal code of the property / collateral?

take_over.intro_en: For a short initial interview before we forward this to marketing, may we proceed?
